use_cases: Filtering and highlighting team member or user lists in dashboards
Spotlighting matching records in data tables based on search queries
Displaying employee or contact directories with live search filtering
ai_summary: A spotlight table component that filters and highlights rows based on search input in real-time. Non-matching rows fade to low opacity while matches remain fully visible. Features status badges with color coding for Active/Offline states, clean table layout, and smooth opacity transitions for visual feedback.
